text:
The basics of Mr Snack
Mr Snack is a orange domestic shorthair who acts similar to Mr Fresh, as he will eat the freeze-dried snacks, due to this his nickname is “冻干哥” or in English  “Freeze-Dried Brother” https://t.co/rTDndJfJNZ

Mr Snack isn’t just know for his love of freeze-dried snacks, he has a ex-wife and two children, his ex-wife is called “Ms Snack” and his son called “Mr. Inspector”, his other kid isn’t named https://t.co/P5eidctMoE
Image of the Snack family eating, and a image of the two Snack kids plus a third cat https://t.co/sC5JrJdc3l
Mr Snack has been seen at two different feeders, the Lucky 7/11 feeder and the Auspicious Restaurant feeder (which is known as the second Mr Fresh feeder) https://t.co/6UMU5lvfxn

Unfortunately due to his popularity, he has become a target for the Cat Torture Clan in China, you have heard about them targeting other cats like Mr Fresh (who luckily is save) and unfortunately they have claimed the lives of some of the cats, most famously Soup Dumpling https://t.co/s5GcxY5Owc

(Soup Dumpling’s mother is safe as of the 2nd of March)
More info can be found here https://t.co/nVX1O7On8Y
Mr Snack is alive and well, his most recent appearance was on the 26th of March, pictured below https://t.co/Tz6TtL4nZ4

the reason why I made this thread is because I wanted to shred on info on some Hello Street Cat lore and I wanted to give a update on Mr Snack since he is a target of the Cat Torture Clan
before I leave, have this image of Soup Dumpling’s mother https://t.co/rwz9x9f00z
thread about hello street cat celebrity, Mrs. Kirby https://t.co/3sSPP3ZXmy

Mrs Kirby is a beloved kitty from Happy Canteen feeder  (also known as Mr. Fresh's Feeder), where she rules these stomping grounds with an iron fist. she is named after the calico markings on her back, as it looks like nintendo video game character kirby (as pictured) https://t.co/7Aj2LEHn4R

mrs. kirby is a fan favourite due to her fierce personality, often squaring up with some of the other kitties. Her most famous battles are against Mr. Beef, who she often battles against. she is pictured below battling Ms Chess and Dr. Smudge. https://t.co/qmroBBM574

overall, mrs. kirby's dominant presence has quickly garnered a lot of attention and praise. despite her cute face and innocent eyes, she is full of fiestiness, commanding with authority. we cant wait until she gives birth to her kittens ♥️ https://t.co/claoNXMNz8
Mr. Beef tapping Mr. Anxiety https://t.co/lQyZDcSc5Q
